title: LetterOnBlock
description: Mods which adds letter on blocks.
body:
🧱 LetterBlocks

🔨 Made by: SamikPlus

LetterBlocks adds a set of decorative blocks with letters and numbers, perfect for creating signs, labels, messages, and custom builds in your Minecraft world.

🎥 Featured by This mod is proudly used by a group of talented YouTubers! Check out their channels here:

Samik – www.youtube.com/@Samikplus

Guliwier – www.youtube.com/@guliwerv2

Nairox – www.youtube.com/@Najroks

Pixel – www.youtube.com/@PixelSigma

Each character is available in three color variants, making it easy to match different building styles and themes.

✨ Features

🔤 Letters A–Z and numbers 0–9

🎨 3 block colors:

Black

Yellow

Green

📦 Separate Creative tabs for each color

🧩 Clean, simple textures designed for building

⚡ Lightweight mod with no performance impact

🛠️ Requirements

Minecraft: 1.20.1-1.20.6

Mod Loader: Fabric

Dependencies: Fabric API (required)

📌 Notes

All blocks are available in Creative Mode

Ideal for builders, map makers, and decoration-focused projects
